title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. vernum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. vernum, also known as the autumn hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The autumn hawk's-beard has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
